method: Separate focused security, operations, and governance parallel-agent reviews inspected source, tests, configuration, and executable controls independently of the prior readiness ledgers.

scope: buyer, worker, enrollment, operator, and provider authentication
threat_or_failure_model: credential namespace confusion, revocation bypass, replay, IDOR, and cross-tenant object access
stale attempts committing output or money after cancellation, lease loss, or retry
hostile request sizes, identifiers, proxy headers, object keys, and webhook order
unaudited or partially committed privileged changes

findings.evidence: task artifact keys bind the attempt; commit requires exact key and digest; late/wrong-attempt proof rejects settlement
control/admin_mutation_audit.go and integration tests require actor, reason, correlation, before/after digest, and atomic audit
agent/src/deadline.rs enforces one monotonic deadline across download, inference, upload, and commit
database constraints/triggers and control/dispute_payout_integration_test.go exclude dispute/release races
macOS sandbox restricts direction and port but does not destination-pin HTTPS

repair: implemented stale-attempt artifact binding
made privileged mutations audit-atomic
added end-to-end monotonic execution deadline
made disputes freeze settlement
added explicit 70-route default-deny authorization matrix
verification: full two-agent native proof for embed and batch_infer
residual_risk: no remote hardware attestation
bearer possession remains authority until revocation
destination-pinned supplier egress requires an external network control
external staging attack rehearsal has not run

scope: retention, deletion, backups, and dispute holds
threat_or_failure_model: buyer inputs, results, credentials, or presigned URLs leaking through logs
data persisting past policy in artifacts or backups
unapproved processing roles, purposes, transfers, or subprocessors

findings.evidence: ops/legal-review.json records unresolved roles, lawful bases, retention, subprocessors, and transfers
DSAR export/deletion and backup-tombstone exercises have no PASS receipt
bounded metric labels, no-store credential responses, and request logs exclude bodies and bearer values

repair: created privacy notice, data-governance matrix, and DSAR runbook drafts
kept private canary synthetic-only and operator controlled
added approval/exercise receipt schema
residual_risk: qualified privacy approval absent
cross-store deletion and backup tombstone not exercised
retention automation is incomplete

scope: entity, jurisdiction, contact, tax, payment, refund, and dispute assumptions
strict separation of test canary from live money
threat_or_failure_model: test operation implying an unapproved commercial relationship
scope creep into real money or independently controlled suppliers

findings.evidence: docs/CANARY_TERMS.md is explicitly draft pending counsel
legal, tax, payments, and privacy approval receipts are absent
independently controlled supplier devices remain prohibited

repair: drafted concise test-mode participation terms
hard-coded no-real-money release boundaries in policies and operator contract
defined exact approval-bundle input
verification: Stripe live key is classified live_refused by release doctor
residual_risk: no legal advice or qualified approval has been supplied
terms acceptance/reacceptance receipt is not implemented

scope: model revisions, files, model cards, and licenses
fonts, icons, renders, brand, and generated assets
threat_or_failure_model: runtime fetching mutable or substituted model bytes
shipping without required attribution or license text
unproven ownership of visual assets or project code

findings.evidence: agent and runtime authority enforce exact model/tokenizer revisions, sizes, and SHA-256 values
docs/THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md and NOTICE remain explicitly incomplete
ops/asset-provenance.json binds hashes but creator/source/trademark receipts are absent

repair: pinned and hash-verified all runtime model artifacts
created model and asset provenance manifests
added NOTICE and third-party register drafts
added candidate SBOM/signature publication workflow
verification: cargo tests cover wrong revision, size, and hash
residual_risk: project license decision absent
artifact-bound license/model-card bundle absent
visual-asset creator and rights receipts absent

scope: supplier Sybil, substitution, collusion, and replay
threat_or_failure_model: denial-of-wallet, dispute, refund, retry, or identity farming abuse

findings.evidence: allowlisted workloads/participants/builds, bounded canary caps, revocation, typed verification, payout hold, and global stops
abuse contact, appeals route, human coverage, and security tabletop receipt are absent

repair: created acceptable-use and abuse-response draft
implemented intake/dispatch/payment/webhook stops
made canary admission and workload bounds fail closed
verification: full local wrong-attempt and ledger proof
residual_risk: no human moderation/on-call exercise
destination-pinning and remote attestation are absent

scope: rounding, floors, quote expiry, and version binding
retry, verification, refund, dispute, and storage-heavy scenarios
threat_or_failure_model: pricing drift between quote and settlement
test shadow values escaping into real payouts

findings.evidence: one canonical economic schedule and database-bound billing tests
ops/economics-readiness.json correctly records NO_CANARY_SAMPLE

repair: bound quotes and jobs to the pricing schedule
reject negative-margin and unsafe decimal plans
set test shadow-value and held-payout caps
refuse payout export in canary
residual_risk: no Stripe test-mode fee/reconciliation sample
no 24-hour volume distribution or retry-cost sample

scope: restart, downgrade, revocation, and inconsistent-result behavior
threat_or_failure_model: duplicate identity, stale attempt, or inconsistent results

findings.evidence: immutable revisions, byte sizes, hashes, source-bound build hash, and canary version/build allowlists
hardware identity is self-declared rather than remotely attested

repair: bound build identity to agent source, Cargo.lock, runtime authority, model files, tuning, and hardware class
removed earnings exposure
enforced workload limits and typed output validation
verification: two distinct local Metal agents completed embed and batch_infer
residual_risk: only one Apple host was physically exercised
cold start was slow
restart storm and memory/thermal fleet tests require the external agents

threat_or_failure_model: leaks, stuck leases, backlog, queue drift, and missed finalizers
corruption or outage during simultaneous restarts
rollback that changes source but not data safely

findings.evidence: immutable nine-service staging, rollback, restart-storm, canary, and soak scripts validate statically
no persistent staging host, two external agents, or 24-hour observation window exists

repair: created digest-only candidate/prior deployment and source probes
created restart-storm and 86400-second soak harnesses
defined strict scenario and agent restart adapter protocols
verification: Docker Compose placeholder expansion: 9 services and 9 immutable images
residual_risk: no external p95/p99 or capacity result
no 24-hour leak/backlog evidence
rollback and restart storm are unexecuted

scope: API, queue, workers, jobs, verification, money, storage, webhooks, backups, and release identity
alert firing, deduplication, acknowledgement, and resolution
threat_or_failure_model: alerts that parse but never reach a human
dashboards that omit stop-state or release identity

findings.evidence: 23 alert rules and 13 Grafana panels pass the deterministic validator
no genuine on-call receiver delivery and resolved receipt exists

repair: added bounded metrics and release labels
added Prometheus, Alertmanager, Grafana, and node exporter to immutable staging
mapped alert rules to runbooks
residual_risk: receiver routing, acknowledgement, deduplication, and resolution are untested
no staging load exists to validate dashboard usefulness

scope: security, privacy, payments, supplier, and service scenarios
threat_or_failure_model: no accountable decision maker during an incident

findings.evidence: docs/SUPPORT_AND_INCIDENT_RUNBOOK.md defines scenarios, roles, stop controls, and evidence expectations
ops/support-incident-tabletop.json is correctly NOT_EXECUTED with no fabricated participants

repair: created support/incident runbook and exercise record
connected operational stops to audited admin controls
included both tabletop receipts in the exact input bundle
residual_risk: roles and contact paths are unstaffed
support and security scenarios have not been exercised

scope: CODEOWNERS for money, auth, schema, release, and security paths

findings.evidence: main branch protection and exact-head CI are configured; CODEOWNERS and candidate publication workflow are present
no non-author collaborator is available for required approval
active repository ruleset 19184161 blocks deletion and non-fast-forward updates for refs/tags/v*; no RC tag has been created while NO-GO

repair: added path ownership and dependency review
made CI assert candidate SHA
made image publication digest-, SBOM-, signature-, and attestation-oriented
kept PR draft and tag absent while NO-GO
verification: existing PR #4 and #5 exact-head checks passed before merge
final GO-closure exact-head CI and reviewer approval remain required
residual_risk: closure branch is not yet remotely reviewed
the repository still has only one accountable CODEOWNER

scope: Go, Rust, Python, JavaScript, actions, containers, and model dependencies
SBOM, signatures, attestations, and artifact retention

findings.evidence: actions and production containers are pinned; models are revision/hash pinned
Candle transitively uses unmaintained paste; no known vulnerability is reported

run 29711173217 published candidate digest e6f8e7e6208119454567f174241e34efea89d499a85d9612af976ccbc0578e8f and prior digest 9a2cf1aa8366bf9f476816ad5288851fea48322296a64c0af82a774b9dccccd2 with verified SPDX SBOMs, keyless OIDC signatures, and attestations

repair: added dependency-review policy
added immutable GHCR candidate/prior build
added SPDX SBOM and keyless cosign signing/attestation/verification
verification: downloaded registry evidence parsed and both signature identities matched the pinned workflow/branch
residual_risk: license completeness remains blocked
transitive paste maintenance warning remains

scope: public landing page and admin console
mobile layout, keyboard interaction, dialog cancellation, contrast, and truthful canary wording

findings.evidence: admin controls tab uses explicit stop labels and native dialog cancel handling
site validator reports WCAG AA minimum contrast 6.06:1

repair: clarified private test-mode positioning
added accessible admin controls and explicit cancel behavior
preserved mobile layout and focus behavior
verification: in-app desktop and mobile DOM/browser inspection
residual_risk: no external canary participant usability session
admin console still depends on a shared break-glass API-key attribution model

scope: encrypted offsite backup and independent restore
Stripe test matrix and real alert receiver
threat_or_failure_model: ephemeral local success mistaken for deployability
backup existing only inside the failure boundary

findings.evidence: digest-only nine-service staging and fail-closed deploy/recovery/rehearsal harness
staging, offsite, Stripe test, receiver, participant agents, and scenario adapters are absent
the only locally present Stripe key class is live_refused and was never used

repair: encrypted backup before upload and required independent download
made restore isolated and checksum-verifying
defined exact external values and expected evidence in one machine contract
made Stripe test-only and payout-export fail closed
residual_risk: all external execution receipts are absent
no 24-hour persistent-state evidence
no provider reconciliation or on-call delivery evidence
